name: Cromwell's Convenience Petroleum & Propane
notes: Confirmed single-location c-store/propane/gas station in Scobey, MT. Small local operator.

name: North Cascade Propane Service
notes: Two locations found in Okanogan County, WA (Twisp and Omak). Serves Methow Valley area. Company does have a website (northcascadespropane.com) despite being flagged as no-website.

name: OnTime Petroleum & Propane
notes: Primary HQ is Gaylord, MN, with SD presence in Howard. Acquired Dakota Gas Propane. Has website ontimepetro.com - was mis-flagged as no-website. Delivers within 75 miles of both Gaylord MN and Howard SD.

name: Fischer Oil & Propane Co
notes: DATA QUALITY ISSUE: Could not confirm any SD-based Fischer Oil & Propane Co. Most search hits refer to Fischer LP Gas (Michigan, multi-location) or Fischer Oil Company (not propane-focused). Possible name confusion or very small unlisted operator. Recommend manual verification - this entity may not exist as named in SD.

name: Nebraska Iowa Supply Co
notes: Single-location wholesale supplier in Omaha, NE. Has website neiasupply.com — was mis-flagged as no-website. Wholesale distributor rather than retail propane marketer.

name: Thunder Basin Propane
notes: Single-location operator serving NE Wyoming (Powder River Basin). Has website thunderbasinpropane.com — was mis-flagged as no-website.

name: Gale's Gas Services
notes: Confirmed single-location operator serving Central SD since 1964.

name: Blue Flame Propane
notes: Single-location UT operator. Has website blueflamepropaneutah.com — was mis-flagged as no-website.

name: Steveson's LP Gas
notes: Small operator with presence in NW Arkansas (Benton County / Siloam Springs) and likely related entity in Fort Gibson OK. Also shows listing in Kansas, OK and Sallisaw, OK on Yelp. Multi-state footprint across AR/OK border area.

name: Champion Propane
notes: DATA QUALITY ISSUE: Company is actually based in Sioux City, IOWA — not South Dakota as originally tagged. Sioux City borders SD so may serve SD customers but state assignment should be corrected to IA.

name: Sandhill Oil Co
notes: Three locations across the Nebraska Sandhills (Thedford, Hyannis, Valentine). Has website sandhilloil.com — was mis-flagged as no-website. Original nlocs=1 should be updated to 3.

name: Enterprise Gas
notes: Single-location operator in Scott County, VA. In business since 1997. Also operates as Enterprise Gas & Garden Center.

name: Bob's Gas Inc
notes: Two related locations in central SD (Saint Lawrence HQ and Miller). Note: a separate 'Bob's Gas Service' exists in Martin, SD (605-685-6538) but appears to be a distinct business. Original nlocs=1 should be updated to 2.

name: Lake Philgas
notes: Single-location operator serving Millard County, UT for over 50 years. Has website lakephilgas.com — was mis-flagged as no-website.

name: Hill Gas
notes: Four locations across Central Texas (Comanche, De Leon, Early/Brownwood, Dublin). Has website hillgas.com — was mis-flagged as no-website. Original nlocs=1 should be updated to 4. Operates as Hill Gas / Central Texas Energy Suppliers.
